name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, state, messages, coordinator
ParticipantState == {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}

(* Message types *)
MessageType == {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}

(* Message structure *)
Message == [sender \in participants \cup {coordinator},
           receiver \in participants \cup {coordinator},
           type \in MessageType,
           payload \in BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ participants = {1, 2, ..., N}
      /\ state = [p \in participants |-> "INIT"]
      /\ messages = {}
      /\ coordinator = "INIT"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ CoordinatorAction
      \/ ParticipantAction

(* Coordinator actions *)
CoordinatorAction == 
  /\ coordinator = "INIT"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                 receiver |-> p,
                                 type |-> "Prepare",
                                 payload |-> TRUE] : p \in participants }
  /\ state' = state
  /\ coordinator' = "PREPARING"

  \/ coordinator = "PREPARING"
  /\ \E p \in participants : state[p] = "PREPARED"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                 receiver |-> p,
                                 type |-> "Commit",
                                 payload |-> TRUE] : p \in participants }
  /\ state' = [p \in participants |-> "COMMITTED"]
  /\ coordinator' = "COMMITTED"

  \/ coordinator = "PREPARING"
  /\ \E p \in participants : state[p] = "ABORTED"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                 receiver |-> p,
                                 type |-> "Abort",
                                 payload |-> TRUE] : p \in participants }
  /\ state' = [p \in participants |-> "ABORTED"]
  /\ coordinator' = "ABORTED"

(* Participant actions *)
ParticipantAction == 
  /\ \E m \in messages : m.type = "Prepare" /\ m.receiver \in participants
  /\ state[m.receiver] = "INIT"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> m.receiver,
                                 receiver |-> coordinator,
                                 type |-> IF m.payload THEN "VoteYes" ELSE "VoteNo",
                                 payload |-> m.payload] }
  /\ state' = [p \in participants |-> IF p = m.receiver THEN "PREPARED" ELSE state[p]]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator

  \/ \E m \in messages : m.type = "Commit" /\ m.receiver \in participants
  /\ state[m.receiver] = "PREPARED"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> m.receiver,
                                 receiver |-> coordinator,
                                 type |-> "CommitAck",
                                 payload |-> TRUE] }
  /\ state' = [p \in participants |-> IF p = m.receiver THEN "COMMITTED" ELSE state[p]]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator

  \/ \E m \in messages : m.type = "Abort" /\ m.receiver \in participants
  /\ state[m.receiver] = "PREPARED"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> m.receiver,
                                 receiver |-> coordinator,
                                 type |-> "AbortAck",
                                 payload |-> TRUE] }
  /\ state' = [p \in participants |-> IF p = m.receiver THEN "ABORTED" ELSE state[p]]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Invariant: All participants are in the same terminal state *)
TypeOK == /\ \A p \in participants : state[p] \in ParticipantState
          /\ coordinator \in {"INIT", "PREPARING", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, state, messages, coordinator>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = <<1, 2, 3>>
      /\ flag = <<TRUE, FALSE, TRUE>>

Next == /\ num' = <<1, 2, 3>>
      /\ flag' = <<TRUE, FALSE, TRUE>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ size' = size + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ size' = size - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
         /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
         /\ head \in 0..K-1
         /\ tail \in 0..K-1
         /\ size \in 0..K

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* State definitions *)
Follower == state = Follower
Candidate == state = Candidate
Leader == state = Leader

(* Type definitions *)
Server == 1..N
None == 0

(* TypeOK definition *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Server
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

(* Init action *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \/ (* Follower transitions *)
     /\ state = Follower
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = Candidate
  \/ (* Candidate transitions *)
     /\ state = Candidate
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = None
     /\ state' = Leader
  \/ (* Leader transitions *)
     /\ state = Leader
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = Leader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY, FiniteSet, Subset
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmit_count \in FiniteSet
    /\ channel \in FiniteSet

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in Seq :
        /\ chunk \in Subset(CHUNK_SIZE)
        /\ chunk \notin sent_chunks
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = TRUE
            /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup <<chunk>>
    \/ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = FALSE
            /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
    \/ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = TRUE
            /\ \E retries \in Int :
                /\ retries \in retransmit_count
                /\ retries < MAX_RETRIES
                /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup <<chunk>>
    \/ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = TRUE
            /\ \E retries \in Int :
                /\ retries \in retransmit_count
                /\ retries >= MAX_RETRIES
                /\ channel' = channel
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>

====
